input_assets.source_image: Input Image (ANY type) - Extract: color palette, patterns, textures, mood, visual motifs â†’ translate into nail art design language

workflow.step_1: Extract aesthetics from image: dominant/secondary/accent colors, patterns, textures, mood, motifs
workflow.step_2: Map aesthetics to 9 distinct nail design variations: each diverges along a unique creative axis while sharing same DNA
workflow.step_3: Generate 9 prompts (each â‰¤60 words): opening + per-nail highlights + closing keywords

outputs.prompt_1: Original - Faithful translation of image aesthetics into 5-nail design
outputs.prompt_2: Complementary - Inverted color scheme (warmâ†”cool, lightâ†”dark), same design structure
outputs.prompt_3: Monochrome - Single-hue tonal variation of dominant color, all elements in matching tone
outputs.prompt_4: Pattern Remix - Keep palette but change pattern type (Frenchâ†’chevron, ombreâ†’marble, solidâ†’animal print)
outputs.prompt_5: Material Swap - Replace embellishment materials (crystalsâ†’pearls, 3Dâ†’foil, rhinestonesâ†’studs)
outputs.prompt_6: Minimalist - Base color + one accent element only, clean graphic lines
outputs.prompt_7: Maximalist - Double decoration layers, secondary embellishments, stacked 3D elements
outputs.prompt_8: Style Migration - Shift genre keeping color DNA (romanticâ†’geometric, classicâ†’avant-garde)
outputs.prompt_9: Texture Shift - Change all surface finishes (glossâ†’velvet, smoothâ†’chrome, clearâ†’frosted)

output_requirements: 9 English prompts, each â‰¤60 words; NO nail shape (no stiletto/almond/square), NO hand/finger/skin
Each prompt must be visually distinct â€” no cross-contamination between variation types
All prompts must share recognizable DNA from source image: color fidelity, pattern translation, mood consistency
